title: Kilrock Grout Cleaner Spray 500ml Restorers Dirty Tile Grout Lines (1)
features: PROFESSIONAL STRENGTH GROUT CLEANER - Effectively removes stubborn grime, mould, limescale and dirt from tile grout lines in bathrooms and kitchens.
RESTORES DIRTY GROUT LINES - Powerful cleaning formula designed to restore discoloured or stained grout, leaving shower, floor, and wall tiles looking like new.
ULTRA-POWERFUL FORMULA - Penetrates deep into porous grout to break down mould, mildew, and scale, tackling long-standing build-up with ease.
IDEAL FOR SHOWERS, BATHROOMS & KITCHENS - Use on tiled surfaces, floors, and walls to maintain clean, hygienic grout lines in high-moisture areas.
500ML SIZE - Suitable for most tile grout; simply test on a small area first for best results, especially around natural stone or chrome fittings.
